data.body: Root-caused during c7c5 dogfooding: the over-exploration/non-convergence was ToolStrategy's forced tool_choice preventing natural termination (A/B: >250 tool calls WITH it / timeout vs ~17 WITHOUT, same model/prompt/ticket; a Claude Code sonnet subagent: ~12) — NOT AutoStrategy per se. The completion verifier now uses RunRequest.output_strategy='extract' (run with no forced response_format -> natural termination in text -> tool-less with_structured_output extraction). This ticket remains: should review/code/scan also move off ToolStrategy (to 'extract' or AutoStrategy/ProviderStrategy) framework-wide? Prior-art: forcing the loop is the documented anti-pattern; bigger/reasoning models over-explore MORE.
